_publications._publicationTitle: Generation of a zebrafish neurofibromatosis model via inducible knockout of nf2a/b.

_contextSnippet: we observed that all four gRNAs could elicit mutations in vivo at almost 80-95% efficiency
details: All four gRNAs elicited mutations in vivo at 80-95% efficiency using T7 endonuclease assay
